title: BingoLobby
description: A lobby for the bongo mod
body:
BingoLobby adds a lobby for the [Bongo](https://modrinth.com/mod/bongo) Mod. When this mod is installed, you won't spawn in the overworld but in a new dimension called the *Lobby Dimension*. Everyone will always spawn at x = 0, y = 65, z= 0. You can build your own lobby there. (Only OPs can interact in the Lobby Dimension)

You can build whatever you want but you need to put carpets in the different color on the ground. Later you'll be able to select your team based on the color of the carpet you're standing on.

You can create start and stop games as usual but the `join` and `leave` commands are disabled.

You can also make teams or players VIP. It's impossible for non-VIP players to join VIP teams. Use the commands `/bingo vip`, `/bingo unvip`, `/bingo vipteam`, `/bingo unvipteam` for this. Team yellow is a VIP team by default.

To limit the maximum amount of players per team, use `/bingo maxplayers`. `-1` will reset this to unlimited.
